userQuery.title: User Query
userQuery.description: The query by the user that describes the intent and the criteria used to search the list of relevant tickets.

useCase.title: Use Case
useCase.description: The use case for which the user wants to retrieve a list of relevant tickets by description. For example, the user queries by description for follow-up actions like asking ticket status update or summary (ticketStatusUpdate), reopening a record(reopenTicket) and adding comments(addCommentToTicket).
